overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The player moves along a sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, approaching a street intersection with heavy atmospheric rain and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered downtown sidewalk with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk toward a group of pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead with glowing blue umbrellas

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway or monorail track running parallel to the street
purple neon sign with Japanese characters reading HOTEL on building facade
massive dark concrete tower with vertical orange illuminated windows
floating holographic display with pink neon geometric shapes
rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights and street illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking along a wet sidewalk. An elevated highway structure looms on the left while a massive brutalist skyscraper towers ahead. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the scene as the player approaches a group of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy sidewalk approaching intersection with digital billboards

events.description: passing by pedestrians with illuminated purple umbrellas on the right side

agents.ego_description: moving past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas while approaching a street intersection with traffic control

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a large illuminated purple umbrella walking alongside the camera

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying an advertisement with a human face
tall black pole with speed limit sign showing 40 and traffic signals
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the street

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, passing pedestrians with glowing purple umbrellas on the right. A large digital billboard displaying a face becomes prominent on the right side. The traffic light pole and crosswalk markings come into view ahead as the player approaches the intersection, while the initial hotel sign and holographic ad fade behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and traffic infrastructure

events.description: reaching the street intersection with visible crosswalk markings and open street view
passing close by the traffic light pole which temporarily dominates the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: approaching and moving through the intersection area, navigating around the traffic light pole

entered.detail: decorative trees with distinctive red leaves lining the sidewalk edge
elevated walkway structure spanning across the street ahead
large yellow electrical utility box at the base of the traffic pole

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the street intersection, with crosswalk markings becoming prominent on the wet asphalt. The traffic light pole moves from the center to the immediate left as the player passes it. Red-leafed trees line the right side while an overhead pedestrian bridge becomes visible in the distance. The scene opens up to show more of the intersection and crossing area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow corridor of towering architecture into an open city intersection. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath an elevated highway and a massive brutalist skyscraper, moving past neon signs and holographic advertisements toward a group of pedestrians. As the camera advances, the initial signage fades behind and the view shifts toward a large digital billboard and pedestrians carrying glowing purple umbrellas on the right. The scene then opens up as the camera reaches the street intersection, passing a traffic light pole on the left while crosswalk markings become prominent on the reflective asphalt. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal red-leafed trees lining the roadside and a distant overhead pedestrian bridge crossing the wide urban expanse.
